task_updates.executor_notes: Extracted `cleanAssistantText`, `executeToolCall`, and `buildToolErrorTurn` into module-level helpers and moved per-iteration tool processing behind `processToolCalls`, leaving `runAgentLoop` focused on initialization, loop control, LLM invocation, dispatch, and persistence. Added direct loop helper coverage and re-ran the full ai-timeline-agent edge test module successfully.
commands_run: rg -n "export function cleanAssistantText|export async function executeToolCall|export function buildToolErrorTurn|async function processToolCalls|export async function runAgentLoop" supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/loop.ts

task_updates.executor_notes: Replaced the sequential command `if` chain with explicit parser functions, a `COMMAND_ALIASES` normalization map, and a `PARSERS` dispatch table. Added parser tests for canonical commands, alias handling, and the unknown-command path, then re-ran the full ai-timeline-agent edge test module successfully.
commands_run: rg -n "type CommandParser|const COMMAND_ALIASES|const PARSERS|export function parseCommand" supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/command-parser.ts

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: `runAgentLoop` now delegates assistant-text cleanup to `cleanAssistantText`, tool dispatch to `executeToolCall`, tool-specific fatal formatting to `buildToolErrorTurn`, and tool-call iteration to `processToolCalls`, so the main function reads as orchestration over init, loop control, LLM invocation, dispatch, and persistence. The ai-timeline-agent edge test module passed.

`parseCommand` now tokenizes once, normalizes aliases through `COMMAND_ALIASES`, dispatches through `PARSERS`, and preserves the unknown-command error path. The parser test file covers canonical command families and aliases including `rm`, `issues`, `gen`, and `settext`.
